creator: rk@ronald.org
text:
On Monday, July 31, 2006 at 23:59:03 CEST, Stanislav Sedov wrote:
> On Mon, 31 Jul 2006 23:48:28 +0200
> Ronald Kuehn <rk@ronald.org> mentioned:
> 
> > 
> > Hi,
> > 
> > that's fine with me. I'm currently unable to properly maintain
> > this port myself. So I would be happy if the submitter (Stanislav Sedov)
> > could take over this port if he likes. If he doesn't want to become
> > maintainer of graphics/ocaml-lablgl please change the MAINTAINER
> > line to ports@freebsd.org.
> > 
> > Ronald
> > 
> > 
> 
> Ok, I will maintain it.
> 
> Thanks!

Great!

Ronald
